movie.actors: Owen Stadele, Edoardo Ballerini, Christopher Cousins, Chuck Jeffreys
movie.plot: Professional mercenary Karl Thomasson arrives in Brooklyn to attend the funeral of his brother Randall, who was murdered while trying to stop a carjacking that has been blamed on the "...
movie.title: The Substitute 2: School's Out
movie.writer: Roy Frumkes (characters), Rocco Simonelli (characters), Alan Ormsby (characters), Roy Frumkes, Rocco Simonelli
